title: An Act relative to funding affordable housing and incentivizing zoning reform

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Cyr, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 1434) of Julian Cyr for legislation to fund affordable housing and incentivize zoning reform by imposing a fee upon the transfer of real property interest in any real property situated within the city or town.  Municipalities and Regional Government.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/29/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in Gardner Auditorium
